name: gilfoyle
description: A skill suite for shipping reliable software, not fastest. Seven skills whose every gate reaches outside the design document — or, in the first gate's case, outside the requester's head.

plugins.name: gilfoyle
plugins.description: Seven skills (interrogated-spec, prove-it-prototype, falsifiable-design, budgeted-plan, checkpointed-build, tdd-scoped, assessing-review-feedback) that force every loop iteration to touch reality and an independent oracle before the design document signs off on itself — starting with the requester's own words.
